title: XPeng Stock Experiences Sharp Decline Amid Bleak Q1 Guidance
text: XPeng Inc (XPEV) stock experienced a sharp decline following the company's release of Q1 2026 guidance that disappointed the market. The company's forward guidance for the first quarter suggested lower-than-expected revenue and deliveries, prompting a significant selloff. Despite recent profitability milestones and record margin expansion, the softer near-term outlook raised concerns about the sustainability of the company's growth trajectory. Investors wrestled with the contradiction between strong operational metrics and weakening demand signals in the Chinese EV market.
